title: Imgur Display
body:
If you want to put this mod in your modpack, feel free to use it :) This mod adds a new block called "Display" that allows you to showcase images directly from Imgur (Only imgur is allowed to prevent porn from being displayed).
The maximum allowed size is 8x8 (by default). To display an image, simply right-click the block and paste the image URL (e.g., "https://i.imgur.com/W7lJrbu.jpeg" or "W7lJrbu").
Only png, jpg, jpeg or gif files are allowed. ![8x8 display](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/2LYmwlgc/images/c6a848a16b586c24cc200bc3fcad86cd264b71c6.png) ![8x8 display with example image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/2LYmwlgc/images/20eb12f0ef3043ba8cd1a986935206697f8c6525.png) ![8x8 display with example gif](https://i.imgur.com/wiwHhmV.gif) ![display gui](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/2LYmwlgc/images/d649f86113615566b51a8a93a6e2e497afad9a5d.png) **Stretch:** Scales the image to fill the entire space.
**Restrict Editing:** Limits access to the GUI, allowing only the owner to make changes.
**Show Hitbox:** Toggles the visibility of the bounding box, which appears when the crosshair is over the block.
Recipe ![display recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/2LYmwlgc/images/65ea59e3385d2134ac8f14e48522aab2d0e50418.png)
